message:
security: Harden Named Pipe Access Control List

- Vulnerability Fix: Replaced 'tokio::net::windows::named_pipe::ServerOptions' (default insecure permissions) with raw 'CreateNamedPipeW'.
- Implemented Strict SDDL: 'D:(A;;GA;;;SY)(A;;GA;;;BA)(A;;GRGW;;;AU)'.
  - Grants FULL_CONTROL to SYSTEM (SY) and Administrators (BA).
  - Grants READ/WRITE to Authenticated Users (AU).
  - Denies remote access explicitly via 'PIPE_REJECT_REMOTE_CLIENTS'.
- Enabled necessary 'Win32_Security*' features in 'service/Cargo.toml'.

files.patch:
@@ -37,5 +37,13 @@ serde = { workspace = true }
 tempfile = "*"
 
 [target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
-windows = { workspace = true }
+windows = { workspace = true, features = [
+    "Win32_Foundation",
+    "Win32_Security",
+    "Win32_Security_Authorization",
+    "Win32_System_Pipes",
+    "Win32_System_Memory",
+    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
+    "Win32_System_IO",
+] }
 windows-service = { version = "0.6" }
